title: Prestwick Airport is being used by Donald Trump to bomb Iran says military intelligence expert

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Hundreds of US air force flights have landed at the Scottish Government owned airport.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Prestwick Airport is being used by Donald Trump to bomb Iran says military intelligence expert USAF Cargo plane in at Prestwick airport (Image: Alasdair MacLeod/Daily Record)

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: Prestwick Airport is being used by the American military to facilitate its bombing of Iran according to a leading military intelligence expert. Philip Ingram, a former Army Colonel and Intelligence Officer, has said the Scottish Government owned facility will “almost certainly” be supporting the war.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Prestwick Airport is being used by Donald Trump to bomb Iran says military intelligence expert
